series_metadata.series_title: Information Resources Management and Data Processing Services Plans
series_metadata.series_description: The Information Resources Management and Data Processing Services Plans contain BWC Information and Technology plans, data processing services plans, strategic plans, and related records used to plan for information systems development, technology acquisitions, data processing services provision, or related areas.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced, and then destroy., Electronic: Delete
